failure_reason: Added a reversible X-Form-Native-Public-Gate for native mutable idea/spec routes. The Form public-gate runner persists route-local rollback receipts in throwaway Postgres and returned 11111111; the HTTP public-gate harness observed five mutation shapes with no-header fanout, preview-header non-executing preview, public-gate native selection, both-header public-gate priority, confidence 1.0, and ordinary_traffic_flip_performed=false. The next boundary is a deployed header-gated public canary before any no-header flip.
